properties.description: This policy restricts the deployment of certain AI models within the AA environment.
nonComplianceMessages: This Azure OpenAI model is not allowed within the AA environment. To add a model to the allowed list, please reach out to your EA. Allowed models are dall-e-3, gpt-4, gpt-4.1, gpt-4.1-mini, gpt-4.1-nano, gpt-4o, gpt-4o-audio-preview, gpt-4o-mini, gpt-4o-mini-audio-preview, gpt-4o-mini-realtime-preview, gpt-4o-mini-transcribe, gpt-4o-mini-tts, gpt-4o-realtime-preview, gpt-4o-transcribe, gpt-4o-tts, gpt-5, gpt-5-chat, gpt-5-mini, gpt-5-nano, text-embedding-3-large, text-embedding-3-small, tts, tts-hd, whisper
